title: Fusion Food Reusable Freezer Blocks for Cool Bags & Boxes – BPA-Free Leak Resistant Long-Lasting Ice Packs for Cool Box, Lunch Boxes, Camping, Picnic, Beach & Outdoor Use
features: Long-Lasting Freezer Blocks for Reliable Cooling: These reusable freezer blocks are the perfect ice packs for cool boxes, cool bags, and lunch boxes. Simply freeze overnight and enjoy long-lasting coldness throughout the day. Designed to keep your food and drinks chilled for hours, these freezer packs are an essential for summer picnics, beach trips, camping, and hiking.

Compact & Durable Design – Fits Anywhere: Our slim and lightweight cool bag ice blocks are compact enough to save space inside your cool bags or lunch boxes, yet strong enough to withstand daily use. These freezer blocks for cool bags are fully sealed, reusable, and don’t require any refilling—making them ideal for everyday storage and outdoor adventures.

Safe & Leak Resistant – BPA-Free Freezer Packs: Made from 100% BPA-free, food-safe materials, these ice blocks are filled with non-toxic gel and sealed to prevent leaks. Whether you're packing lunch, carrying baby food, or heading to work, these ice packs for lunch boxes and breastmilk bags offer safe and dependable cooling every time.

Versatile Cooling Solution for All Needs: These ice packs for coolers work just as well for hiking, camping, and beach days as they do for school, office, or home use. Great for keeping snacks, drinks, breastmilk, and packed lunches fresh. Ideal cold packs for kids’ schoolbags, adult work bags, or travel coolers on long journeys.

Multipurpose Cold Compress Use – More Than Just Cooling: Beyond cooling your food and drinks, these freezer blocks also serve as effective cold compresses to help soothe injuries, swelling, or joint pain. Use them to reduce inflammation from arthritis or as emergency cold packs for outdoor activities. A true multipurpose solution for any home or travel kit.
description: KEEP FOOD AND DRINKS ALWAYS COOL: Get yourself ready for great camping trips, festivals, holidays, school lunches or to keep your on-the-go meal prep and drinks cool and fresh. Just slide your freeze boards in between food and drinks in your lunch box, cooler bag or cool box. These freezer blocks are reusable, long-lasting and made of leakage-proof BPA-free plastic casting. Designed to fit into almost any sized cool bag. They take up very little room so leaving you space for your food and drinks and will easily fit into small spaces. Add as many as you need depending on your cooler size. Keep your favourite meals, dairy snacks, beverages, and more fresh and cool. FEATURES: Smart design: Slim and rectangular design. Easy carry and a leak-proof lid. Available in snow-flake designs. Long-lasting cold: Keep your food and drinks chilled, fresh and tasty for hours with this ice pack block. Safe: Made from non-toxic and BPA-free material. BPA approved. Reusable: Use them again and again. Suitable for: Easily fits into all types of lunch boxes, lunch bags, grocery bags, coolers and cool boxes. DESIGN SPECIFICATIONS: Design: Snowflake & Plain Sizes: 11 x 16 x 1.3 cm / 14 x 25 x 1.3 cm / 9 x 16 x 2 cm Packs: 4PK / 6PK USE INSTRUCTIONS: Place in the freezer for 12 hours before use. Wrap in a towel for first-aid use.

specifications_table.Features: ‎Leak Resistant, Long-Lasting, Multipurpose, BPA-Free Materials, Compact, Durable Design
